mapper.sql: c.COMMENT_ID AS commentId, c.POST_ID AS postId, c.PARENT_ID AS parentId, c.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(c.BODY, 32000, 1) AS body, c.IS_DELETED AS isDeleted, c.REG_DATE AS regDate, NVL(m.NICKNAME, '익명') AS nickname
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TB_POST_COMMENT c LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON c.MEMBER_NO = m.MEMBER_NO WHERE c.POST_ID = #{postId} AND NVL(c.IS_DELETED, 'N') = 'N' AND c.PARENT_ID IS NULL ORDER BY c.REG_DATE ASC

SELECT
FROM TB_POST_COMMENT c LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON c.MEMBER_NO = m.MEMBER_NO WHERE c.POST_ID = #{postId} AND NVL(c.IS_DELETED, 'N') = 'N' AND c.PARENT_ID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY c.REG_DATE ASC

SELECT
FROM TB_POST_COMMENT c LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON c.MEMBER_NO = m.MEMBER_NO WHERE c.POST_ID = #{postId} AND NVL(c.IS_DELETED, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY NVL(c.PARENT_ID, c.COMMENT_ID), c.REG_DATE ASC

SELECT
FROM TB_POST_COMMENT c LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON c.MEMBER_NO = m.MEMBER_NO WHERE c.COMMENT_ID = #{commentId} AND NVL(c.IS_DELETED, 'N') = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_POST_COMMENT WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND NVL(IS_DELETED, 'N') = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TB_POST_COMMENT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_POST_COMMENT ( COMMENT_ID, POST_ID, PARENT_ID, MEMBER_NO, BODY, IS_DELETED, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{commentId}, #{postId}, #{parentId}, #{memberNo}, #{body}, 'N', SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_POST_COMMENT SET IS_DELETED = 'Y' WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId} AND NVL(IS_DELETED, 'N') = 'N'
